+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "envoy-35783-support-body-transformations",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "envoy: Support Body Transformations",
+    "description": "Support Body Transformations. Requested by 17+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current envoy deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your envoy version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nhelm list -n envoy 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working envoy installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review envoy configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant envoy configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nkubectl get configmap -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=envoy\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support Body Transformations",
+        "description": "Commit Message: http: new body transform filter with the substitution formatter\nAdditional Description:\n\nTo close https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/issues/35783. There is enough context in the #35783. In short sentence, this PR add a transform filter to modify request or response headers by the substitution formatter API.\n\nIt's also possible to add body attributes to headers and refresh the routes.\n\nRisk Level: low. New HTTP filter.\nTesting: unit/integration.\nDocs Changes: added.\nRelease Notes: Body transformation filter added.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n envoy -l app.kubernetes.io/name=envoy\nkubectl get events -n envoy --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support Body Transformations\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "Commit Message: http: new body transform filter with the substitution formatter\nAdditional Description:\n\nTo close https://github.com/envoyproxy/envoy/issues/35783. There is enough context in the #35783. In short sentence, this PR add a transform filter to modify request or response headers by the substitution formatter API.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
